locations.name: 安納托利亞
locations.summary: 安纳托利亚（英語：Anatolia；希臘語：ανατολή；土耳其語：Anadolu；亞拉姆語：ܐܢܛܘܠܝܐ；亞美尼亞語：Անատոլիա），亦作安纳托力亚、安那托利亞、阿纳多卢，又名小亞細亞（土耳其語：Küçük Asya；英語：As…

locations.name: 撒哈拉沙漠
locations.summary: 撒哈拉沙漠（阿拉伯語：الصحراء الكبرى，aṣ-Ṣaḥrāʾ al-Kubrā ， 清朝直譯大沙漠）位於非洲大陸北部，是世界最热的荒漠，亦是世界第三大荒漠，仅次于南极和北极，同时也是世界上最大的沙漠，其总面积超过9,400,00…

relations.subject: Western Bonelli's warbler
relations.evidence: (2002): "Taxonomic recommendations for European birds. " Ibis 144(1): 153–159. * Western Bonelli's warbler, Phylloscopus bonelli, which breeds in southwest Europe and north Africa * Eastern Bonelli's warbler, Phylloscopus orientalis, which breeds in southeast Europe and Asia Minor The breeding ranges of the two species do not overlap; while their appearance and songs are very similar, the calls are completely different (see below)

relations.subject: Western Bonelli's warbler
relations.evidence: Avian Biol.]] 26: 139–153. The species is migratory, wintering in sub-Saharan Africa
